pages.text: 下过雨的早晨，天空出现了一道好大好大的彩虹。咘咘趴在窗户上看呆了。
pages.text_en: After the rain, a big rainbow appeared in the sky. Bubu looked out the window, amazed.

pages.text: 彩虹好漂亮！我想摸摸它！咘咘跳下窗台，冲出了家门。
pages.text_en: The rainbow is so pretty! I want to touch it! Bubu jumped down and ran outside.

pages.text: 咘咘跑啊跑，跑到了小山坡上。可是彩虹看起来还是好远好远。
pages.text_en: Bubu ran and ran to the hill. But the rainbow still looked far away.

pages.text: NOMI 正好在山坡上采蘑菇。咘咘，你跑这么快干嘛呀？我要去摸彩虹！你知道彩虹在哪里吗？
pages.text_en: NOMI was picking mushrooms on the hill. Bubu, why are you running so fast? I want to touch the rainbow! Do you know where it is?

pages.text: NOMI 想了想说：我听说彩虹的尽头在森林那边。我们一起去找！
pages.text_en: NOMI thought for a moment. I heard the rainbow ends in the forest. Let's go find it together!

pages.text: 走着走着，他们遇到了 NONO。NONO 正在树枝上甩翅膀上的雨水。你们去哪呀？去找彩虹！太好了，我飞上去看看彩虹到底在哪里！
pages.text_en: Along the way, they met NONO shaking rain off his wings. Where are you going? To find the rainbow! Great! I'll fly up and see where it is!

pages.text: NONO 飞得高高的，飞到了云的旁边。我看到了！彩虹在河边！快跟我来！
pages.text_en: NONO flew high, up near the clouds. I see it! The rainbow is by the river! Follow me!

pages.text: 三个好朋友跑到了河边。可是到了河边一看，彩虹又跑到更远的地方去了！
pages.text_en: The three friends ran to the river. But when they got there, the rainbow had moved even farther away!

pages.text: 怎么办？彩虹一直在跑！咘咘有点累了，坐在了河边的石头上。
pages.text_en: What should we do? The rainbow keeps moving! Bubu was tired and sat on a stone by the river.

pages.text: 这时候，NOMI 看到了河水里有什么东西在闪。咘咘你看！河面上，阳光照着水花，变出了好多好多小彩虹！
pages.text_en: Then NOMI saw something sparkling in the water. Bubu, look! The sunlight on the water made many little rainbows!

pages.text: 咘咘伸出小爪子，水花溅在手上，一道小小的彩虹就在她的手心里！我摸到彩虹了！咘咘开心地叫起来。
pages.text_en: Bubu reached out her paw. Water splashed on her hand, and a tiny rainbow appeared! I touched a rainbow! Bubu cheered.

pages.text: NONO 也飞到瀑布旁边，翅膀一扇，水雾里也出现了一道彩虹。我也有彩虹！
pages.text_en: NONO flew to the waterfall and flapped his wings. A rainbow appeared in the mist! I have a rainbow too!

pages.text: NOMI 笑着说：原来彩虹不用追，有阳光有水的地方，就有彩虹。
pages.text_en: NOMI smiled. We don't need to chase rainbows. Wherever there's sun and water, there's a rainbow.

pages.text: 回家的路上，咘咘一路蹦蹦跳跳，踩着水坑，每个水坑里都有小小的彩虹。今天是最棒的一天！晚安，咘咘。明天还会有新的彩虹等着你。
pages.text_en: On the way home, Bubu hopped and jumped in puddles. Each puddle had a little rainbow. Today was the best day! Good night, Bubu. Tomorrow, new rainbows will be waiting.

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：有些美好的东西，追是追不到的。但只要留心观察身边，就会发现美好一直都在！有阳光有水的地方，就有彩虹哦。
pages.text_en: 💡 Bubu learned: Some beautiful things can't be caught by chasing. But if you look closely around you, you'll find beauty everywhere! Wherever there's sun and water, there's a rainbow.
